## XComponentAPI interface

The XComponentAPI exposes access to the [XBus](./x-components.xbus.md)<!-- -->, and store aliases to the components.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
export interface XComponentAPI extends XComponentBusAPI, XComponentAliasAPI 
```
<b>Extends:</b> [XComponentBusAPI](./x-components.xcomponentbusapi.md)<!-- -->, [XComponentAliasAPI](./x-components.xcomponentaliasapi.md)
